configOptions.description: Choose an approval and sandboxing preset for your session
configOptions.name: Approval Preset

options.description: Codex can read files in the current workspace. Approval is required to edit files or access the internet.
options.name: Read Only

options.description: Codex can read and edit files in the current workspace, and run commands. Approval is required to access the internet or edit other files. (Identical to Agent mode)
options.name: Default

options.description: Codex can edit files outside this workspace and access the internet without asking for approval. Exercise caution when using.
options.name: Full Access

configOptions.description: Choose which model Codex should use
configOptions.name: Model

options.description: Latest frontier agentic coding model.
options.name: gpt-5.4

options.description: Smaller frontier agentic coding model.
options.name: GPT-5.4-Mini

options.description: Frontier Codex-optimized agentic coding model.
options.name: gpt-5.3-codex

options.description: Ultra-fast coding model.
options.name: GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark

options.description: Optimized for professional work and long-running agents
options.name: gpt-5.2

configOptions.description: Choose how much reasoning effort the model should use
configOptions.name: Reasoning Effort

options.description: Fast responses with lighter reasoning
options.name: Low

options.description: Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks
options.name: Medium

options.description: Greater reasoning depth for complex problems
options.name: High

options.description: Extra high reasoning depth for complex problems
options.name: Xhigh
